concept: Introverting so hard it’s practically cardio
title: Introverting So Hard It’s Practically Cardio Funny Relatable Shirt
description:
Sometimes socializing feels like an Olympic sport, and you're just here to win gold in solitude. This design is perfect for anyone who treasures their alone time but still wants to make a bold (and hilarious) statement. Whether you're binge-watching your favorite series or dodging weekend plans for a self-care marathon, this is your uniform. 

Perfect for: 
- Introverts who wear their social limits on their sleeve. 
- Anyone with a love/hate relationship with group chats. 
- Gifting to that one friend who’s always “charging their social battery.”

DETAILS: Crisp and clean text design featuring quirky typography with ‘Introverting so hard it’s practically cardio’ centered proudly. Designed in dual tones for versatility on light or dark colors. Choose from a range of sizes and colors to match your vibe. Made-to-order for the stay-home-and-thrive champion in you.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
